entries.name: linear-pp-cli
entries.description: Offline-capable, agent-native CLI for the Linear API with SQLite-backed sync, search, and cross-entity queries.

entries.description: Query Steam player profiles, game libraries, achievements, and friends from the terminal. 90/100 Grade A.
